es.answer: The conditions when entering the MDI/MDA mode will be those of the interruption point; i.e. the CNC maintains the history of active G and M functions, feedrate, spindle speed, tool and other commands that were programmed.

es.question: En la búsqueda de bloque automática, ¿es necesario seleccionar el bloque de parada y qué ocurre si no se selecciona el primer bloque para iniciar la búsqueda?
es.answer: In the automatic block search, there is no need to select the stop block, as the CNC runs the search up to the block where the program was interrupted. If the first block is not selected, the block search starts at the beginning of the program.
